data.title: Trump's Tariff Threat Causes Tesla's South Korean Rivals To Rethink $54B Battery Plant Investment
data.description: Korean firms are in talks with U.S. authorities to maintain tax credits, crucial for their operations amid declining EV demand and battery prices.

data.title: Bitcoin Seller's Delight: Bhutan Transfers $40M In BTC To QCP Capital
data.description: The Royal Government of Bhutan has transferred 406.074 BTC, valued at approximately $40 million, to QCP Capital, according to data from Onchain Lens.

data.title: Arcellx's Cancer Cell Therapy Shows Deep, Durable Responses With Manageable Safety Profile In Heavily Pretreated Blood Cancer Patients
data.description: Arcellx's Phase 2 trial of anito-cel in relapsed multiple myeloma reveals high response rates and manageable safety, with durable patient outcomes.

data.title: Just Two Months After IPO, BioAge Labs Stops Eli Lilly-Collaborated Obesity Trial On Safety Concerns
data.description: BioAge Labs halts STRIDES Phase 2 trial of azelaprag after liver enzyme elevations, plans further analysis with updates expected in Q1 2025.

data.title: Tesla Model Q Priced Below $30,000 After Subsidies To Reportedly Launch In First Half Of 2025
data.description: Tesla will reportedly launch a new vehicle called Model Q in the first half of next year, priced below $30,000 after subsidies.
